item.title: Letter on careworkers’ visas
item.dc:creator: Craig Bayne
item.description: See below for Jeremy’s letter to the Home Secretary on the proposed changes to careworkers’ visas.

item.title: Ofwat deal statement
item.dc:creator: Craig Bayne
item.description: Many people across our community are rightly angry that a basic human necessity like water has been treated as a cashcow for private shareholders and creditors while our rivers are polluted and our infrastructure crumbles. The current proposal from Thames Water’s creditors is an insult to every household in the region. To suggest that a […]

item.title: Letter on Syria
item.dc:creator: Craig Bayne
item.description: See below for Jeremy’s letter to the Foreign Secretary on the situation in Syria.

item.title: Christmas Newsletter – 2025
item.dc:creator: Craig Bayne
item.description: 2025 Christmas and New Years’ Newsletter It is an honour to represent the people of Islington North in Parliament, and to campaign alongside you for a fairer society. Our People’s Forums have been very effective and I’ve enjoyed interacting with a range of people. The aim has been to create a shared space where everyone’s […]

item.title: Christmas Newsletter – 2024
item.dc:creator: scd327
item.description: It is the honour of my life to represent you in Parliament. Thank you to all those who supported our election campaign on July 4th. Our result was about our community, and there was only one way we could win this election: together. My role as an MP is to listen to you, learn from […]

item.title: Assisted Dying Statement
item.dc:creator: scd327
item.description: Many of you have written in to me about the Terminally Ill Adults (End of Life) Bill and that is as it should be, given the very serious nature of the bill. I wanted to take the time to explain my opposition to this legislation. I understand why many people feel so passionately about their […]
